headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (long-term transition/regulatory costs, not immediate) — Adani Power receives Coal Ministry approval to commence Dhirauli mine operations, enabling capacity expansion.
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, GRI, CDP, TCFD frameworks; non-disclosure risks SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
No immediate P/E compression; long-term margin risk if transition costs rise.
No direct cost of capital impact; future bond spreads could widen if ESG ratings fall.
